prose:
Frontier-orbital energies and gap for ethylene were computed using density functional theory (DFT) at the tier `standard` level (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, in the gas phase, with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The geometry was provided from the `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz` file, and the DFT calculation was a single point on this geometry. The SCF converged in 6 cycles.

The HOMO energy is -7.6155818 eV, and the LUMO energy is -0.17986527 eV, resulting in a HOMO-LUMO gap of 7.4357165 eV. No warnings were reported.
